subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend and steadfast one in the Covenant! Although for a considerable time, due to numerous obstacles, I have found no opportunity [3.5s]... ...The root cause of wrongdoing is ignorance, and we must therefore hold fast to the tools of perception and knowledge… The subjects to be taught in children's school are many
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار قدیم ای ثابت بر پیمان اگر چه مدتیست مدید که از کثرت موانع فرصتی نیافتم
subcodes.subjects: @educational curricula, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @education of children; moral education, @education and the development of capacity
